title: BILBAU Paint Stirrer Paddle Mixer for Hand Drill, 60mm x 350mm, Galvanized Steel HEX Paint Mixer for Drill, Small Drill Plaster Mixer, Mixing Paddle for Paint, Plaster, Jointing Compound, Varnish
features: ✅ VERSATILE USE: Our paint mixer drill attachment is suitable for the 600W power tools available at the market. It is great for stirring paint, varnish, joint filler, finishing plaster, epoxy paint, tanking paint or tanking slurry.

✅ EASY-TO-USE: The galvanized mixing paddle for drill makes this paint stirrer for drill even more efficient. The paint mixing paddle is built in a way that makes the process more even and safer for the user whether you work at the construction site or in home improvement.

✅ DURABLE MATERIAL: The resin mixer stick is made of galvanised steel and therefore highly durable. Moreover, the paddle mixer for drill is reinforced by the welds, which makes it even more stable and resistant.

✅ RUST-RESISTANT: The small hand drill stirrer is not only resistant to corrosion, but also very easy to clean. What is more, the construction prevents the paddle from splashing the paint while mixing on the site or at home.
✅ TECHNICAL DATA: Dimensions: stirrer Ø 60mm; rod length 350mm; Recommended hand drill power - 600 watts. Material: galvanized steel; Do not use with impact wrenches.
